How We Help Restaurants & Hotels

 

We at Taxaccolega are aware of the particular financial challenges that the hospitality sector faces. We offer specialised services for hotels and restaurants that are intended to assist you in successfully overcoming these obstacles. Here’s how we help your company:

Tax Compliance:

In order to maximise your tax position and comply with tax laws that are unique to the hospitality industry, our knowledgeable team makes sure that your income and expenses are carefully documented and reported.

Financial Management:

To help you make wise financial decisions, we keep organised financial records, which are necessary for effective tax filing and general financial health.

Services

Why Choose Us

Taxaccolega provides personalised assistance. You get a dedicated accountant when you work with us who fully knows the ins and outs of your finances. No call centers, no general advice, but a real expert focusing on your specific tax and accounting needs.

Have been paying too much tax? We will optimise and curtail your unnecessary payable taxes. While we plan and structure strategically and carefully, we help you maximize tax efficiency, claim available reliefs, and avoid unnecessary liabilities, all while staying HMRC-compliant.

Your finances are in the hands of qualified accountants and credible experts since we are licensed and regulated by ICAEW and ACCA. Whether it's tax planning, accounting advice, or compliance, we 100% guarantee everything is done honestly, accurately, and completely aligned with UK tax laws.

Deadlines creep up fast, but we won’t let you miss them. We provide timely reminders for tax filings, payments, and compliance requirements, so you never have to worry about penalties or last-minute stress ever again.

No hidden fees. No surprise charges. We believe in clear, upfront pricing and full transparency in our work. We also use reliable, industry-leading accounting softwares like Xero, Taxcalc, btc, & VT to ensure your tax and financial security, total accuracy and efficiency.

Beyond just the numbers, we provide cashflow forecasting to help you plan for the future. Tax-saving opportunities, investment structuring, or business growth tactics, we’re here to guide you toward smarter tax-saving decisions.

FAQs

1. How can Taxaccolega assist with managing seasonal cash flow fluctuations in the hospitality industry?

We offer customised financial plans to handle changes in seasonal cash flow. We assist you in planning for peak and off-peak seasons by analysing your financial data, ensuring that your hotel or restaurant remains financially stable all year long.

2. What are the benefits of accurate stock management for my restaurant or hotel?

Cost- and waste-controlling strategies depend on accurate stock management. We help you maximise stock levels and boost profitability with our full range of bookkeeping and financial reporting services, which includes inventory management.

3. How does Taxaccolega help with employee payroll management in the hospitality sector?

Our payroll services ensure timely and accurate salary calculations, tax withholdings, and compliance with employment regulations. This helps you manage your staff efficiently and avoid any payroll-related issues.

4. What tax deductions are available for renovations and improvements in the hospitality industry?

We assist you in locating and maximising tax deductions for home improvements and renovations. Our professionals make sure you take advantage of all available tax breaks, which lowers your overall tax liability and supports your improvement investment in real estate.

5. How can we improve our financial health with better cost control?

We examine your financial processes to find opportunities to enhance cost control. With the aid of our financial management services, you can improve the overall financial health of your hotel or restaurant by streamlining operations and implementing cost-saving strategies.

ID Verification Form For Companies House

From 18 November 2025, UK law will require all company Directors and Persons with Significant Control (PSCs) to verify their identity with Companies House.

  • Companies House will issue a personal code to PSCs.
  • Taxaccolega (ACSP) can help collect data and assist.
  • Please answer the questions and upload documents.

Terms & Conditions – Identity Verification Process

By submitting, you authorise Taxaccolega to process your data for ID verification with Companies House.

1. Purpose of this Agreement
1.1 These Terms & Conditions apply to the collection and processing of personal data and identity documents required under the Economic Crime and Corporate Transparency Act 2023 and Companies House identity verification rules effective from 18 November 2025.
1.2 By submitting your details through our online form, you authorise Taxaccolega Chartered Accountants (as an Authorised Corporate Service Provider – ACSP) to process your information for the sole purpose of fulfilling the identity verification obligations set by Companies House.

2. Client Responsibilities
2.1 You confirm that all information and documents you provide are true, accurate, complete, and current.
2.2 You accept full responsibility for any false, misleading, or incomplete information supplied, and acknowledge that this may lead to penalties or rejection of your verification by Companies House.
2.3 You must notify us promptly of any change in your details (such as name, address, or role in the company) which may affect the verification process.

3. Our Role & Limitation
3.1 We act solely as an intermediary in submitting your information to Companies House.
3.2 We do not guarantee the acceptance, speed, or outcome of any identity verification by Companies House. The final decision rests solely with Companies House.
3.3 We shall not be liable for any loss, delay, penalty, or consequence arising from:
* (a) inaccurate or incomplete information provided by you,
* (b) delays or failures within Companies House systems,
* (c) rejection or failure of verification by Companies House, or
* (d) events outside our reasonable control.
3.4 Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for death, personal injury, fraud, or any liability which cannot be excluded under law..

4. Data Protection
4.1 We will process your personal data in accordance with the UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018.
4.2 Your data will be used solely for the purpose of identity verification and related compliance requirements.
4.3 We will retain your information only as long as required by law or regulatory obligations.
4.4 We will not disclose your information to third parties other than Companies House or other parties legally entitled to it.

5. Client Consent
By ticking the consent box and submitting your details, you confirm that:
• You have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms & Conditions.
• You consent to Taxaccolega Chartered Accountants acting as your Authorised Corporate Service Provider (ACSP) for identity verification purposes.
• You consent to the processing, storage, and transfer of your personal data and documents in accordance with Section 4 above..

6. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, and any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
